creator: pen@lysator.liu.se
text:
Created attachment 255468
Add hw.mpr.encl_min_slots loader.conf setting to override detected num_slots

Please find enclosed a patch to the mpr driver that adds a kernel tunable knob to enforce a minimum value for the detected enclosure "num_slots". Setting:

   hw.mpr.encl_min_slots="40" 

solves the issue with multiple D6020 enclosures connected to one controller and makes it possible to use all 140 drives.

(The D6020 seems to report 18 instead of 43 with is wrong. Other boxes also have strange values (a 24-drive SuperMicro storage enclosure seems to report 43, but that atleast doesn't prevent it from finding all drives).

The mpr driver probably also should add some sanity checking and give more warnings if (like in my case) it allocates room for 18 drives and then tries to populate with 35... but that's for another day & patch).
